title: The Big Picture Sanctions And Irans Elderly Vlccs
section_path: The Big Picture Sanctions And Irans Elderly Vlccs
section_path_text: The Big Picture Sanctions And Irans Elderly Vlccs
summary:
Main
Crunch Time
Three recent developments suggest a changing market for VLCCs over the age of 20:
The US sanctioned another 21 tankers this week for involvement in the Iranian oil trade, bringing the total number of sanctioned VLCCs up to 80, or 9% of the global VLCC fleet. China cut back its imports of sanctioned crude grades in November, including oil from Iran. Two shadow fleet VLCCs are being pushed in the market for demolition.
